chapters.title: One Piece
chapters.summary: 'Nerona Imu Descends' — Imu's true form and face are revealed for the first time as they arrive in Elbaf. The Five Elders try to prevent Imu from leaving the Holy Land, but Imu descends with overwhelming power, surrounding Aurust Castle with black flames. Next chapter 1180 expected April 19, 2026.

chapters.title: Nano Machine
chapters.summary: Chapter 308 released April 15, 2026. The series follows Cheon Yeo-Woon's continued ascent through the Demonic Cult hierarchy using his future-sent nano machine implant. Weekly manhwa serialization continues.

chapters.title: Dandadan
chapters.summary: During a group outing, Okarun suggests meeting up with Momo and Jiji. Jiji reveals he has been secretly channeling ki into Momo to ease her chest pain, deepening the relationship dynamics between the main characters.

chapters.title: Blue Lock
chapters.summary: Chapter 343 released April 14, 2026. Following Barou's declaration as the new king of Blue Lock after scoring against France, the team dynamics and France's shift to a more aggressive strategy under coach Rodin continue to unfold.

chapters.title: Sakamoto Days
chapters.summary: Chapter 255 released April 12, 2026. Weekly serialization in Weekly Shonen Jump continues. Next chapter 256 expected April 19, 2026.

chapters.title: Kingdom
chapters.summary: 'Allies' Self-Sacrifice' — part of the Great War of Qin and Zhao Arc. Next chapter expected May 5, 2026.

chapters.title: Eleceed
chapters.summary: 'Beyond an Apology' — Chapter 397 released April 14, 2026. Follows Chapter 396 'Shadows' from April 7 focusing on Jiwoo's training with Kartein, incorporating healing mana into electrical strikes to prevent physical recoil. Weekly WEBTOON serialization continues.

chapters.title: Spy x Family
chapters.summary: Chapter 133 released April 12, 2026. Biweekly serialization in Shonen Jump+ continues. Next chapter 134 expected April 26, 2026.

chapters.title: Omniscient Reader's Viewpoint
chapters.summary: Chapter 306 released April 8, 2026. The manhwa adaptation of the popular web novel continues with Kim Dokja's ongoing journey through the scenarios. Biweekly serialization continues.

chapters.title: Marriage Toxin
chapters.summary: Chapter 160 released approximately April 14, 2026. Weekly serialization in Shonen Jump+ continues alongside the anime adaptation by Bones Film which premiered April 7, 2026. Series has 17 tankōbon volumes with 1,000,000+ copies in circulation.

chapters.title: WITCH WATCH
chapters.summary: Chapter 243 released April 12, 2026. Weekly serialization in Shonen Jump continues. Series has 25 volumes compiled as of March 2026, with the next volume scheduled for June 4, 2026.

chapters.title: One Punch Man
chapters.summary: 'Life or Death 2' — Chapter 228 released April 9, 2026. Follows Chapter 227 'Life or Death' from March 26. Tatsumaki continues her battle against emerging insect swarms after seemingly defeating Aggregation in the Neo Heroes Uprising Arc.

chapters.title: Jujutsu Kaisen
chapters.summary: Main series concluded with final chapter 'From Now On'. The sequel manga 'Jujutsu Kaisen Modulo' also concluded with Chapter 25 on March 8, 2026.

chapters.title: Chainsaw Man
chapters.summary: Series concluded with Chapter 232 'Thank You, Chainsaw Man', ending the Academy Saga (Part 2). Final Volume 24 releases June 4, 2026.

chapters.title: Frieren: Beyond Journey's End
chapters.summary: On indefinite hiatus since October 2025 due to health concerns for creators Yamada and Abe. No confirmed return date.

chapters.title: Tower of God
chapters.summary: Season 3 concluded. Main series on hiatus pending Season 4 announcement by author SIU.

chapters.title: Solo Leveling: Ragnarok
chapters.summary: Season 2 ended with Chapter 68 on January 7, 2026. Series on hiatus after illustrator JIN departed for mandatory military service. Expected to return around May–June 2026 with a new artist from Redice Studios.

chapters.title: My Hero Academia
chapters.summary: Series concluded with Chapter 430 plus epilogue Chapter 431. Anime special 'More' adapting the epilogue premieres May 2, 2026.

chapters.title: Kaiju No. 8
chapters.summary: Series completed with 129 chapters across 16 volumes. Anime 'Final Chapter' season by Production I.G is in production.

chapters.title: Vinland Saga
chapters.summary: Final chapter announced. Chapter 220 will be published in the September 2026 issue of Monthly Afternoon, scheduled for July 25, 2026, ending the 20-year series.
